2. 【招生计划】本省物理类计划2021年50人、2022年50人、2023年50人、2024年49人、2025年41人；2026年计划41人，与2025年持平，无扩招缓解竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 98 5、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第17名，近年稳居全国前20，综合实力强劲；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风及校园安全事件；抖音热度排名第 44（较热）；2024年曾出现明显负面舆情，但2025年声誉转为中性/混合（含科研成果正面信号），对报考心理影响有限；统计学A+、计算机科学与技术A、物理 学A-、工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、法学A+等，理工文管兼优，学科覆盖面广。

计算机类推荐但明显降温；电子信息/通信高热推荐；电气工程及其自动 化高热推荐；人工智能谨慎观望；本省2026年物理类考生约456000人，较2025年440208人增加约3.6%，竞争略有加剧；中 国人民大学位于北京，非本省高校；广东省为生源大省，北京高校对广东物理类考生吸引力较强，人大在物理类开设的统计学、计算机、人工智能等热门专业契合市场需求。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 665 → 682 → 1067 → 1228 → 823. In 2023–2024, there was a significant backward shift (ranking number increased), but in 2025, it rebounded sharply to 823, indicating a recovery in the attractiveness of Renmin University in Physics Category.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 50 in 2021, 50 in 2022, 50 in 2023, 49 in 2024, and 41 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 41, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion to ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 17th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, consistently among the top 20 nationally, with strong comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and campus safety incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 44 (relatively hot); there was significant negative public opinion in 2024, but in 2025, the reputation turned neutral/mixed (including positive signals from scientific research achievements), with limited impact on application psychology; Statistics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Physics A-, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Law A+, etc., with excellent coverage in science, engineering, liberal arts, and management.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Computer Science is recommended but significantly cooling down; Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended and hot; Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended and hot; Artificial Intelligence is cautiously observed; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 440,208 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, not a provincial university; Guangdong is a major source province, and Beijing universities have a strong appeal to Physics Category candidates in Guangdong. The popular majors offered by Renmin University in Physics Category, such as Statistics, Computer Science, and Artificial Intelligence, align with market demand.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 823, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the intensified competition due to an approximately 3.6% increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, and the recovery trend of the ranking having rebounded significantly in 2025, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 838, with a range of 758–918.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 758–918, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Statistics, various directions of Science Experimental Class) as the main force, Tier 1 majors (Law, Artificial Intelligence, Turing Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Physics, Chemistry and other basic disciplines) as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 141 → 165 → 163 → 150 → 148, fluctuating narrowly within the 140–165 range, with a slight forward shift (decreasing ranking number) in recent two years; the 2025 baseline is about 148. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 53 in 2021, 53 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 45 in 2024, and 58 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 63, an expansion of about 8.6% compared to 2025, which helps reduce competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and campus safety incidents; Douyin popularity ranks 44th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure; in 2024, there was a notable negative public opinion (professor sexual harassment incident), which slightly suppresses application willingness. Law A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Sociology A+, Statistics A+, Marxist Theory A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, and 15 other A-/A/A+ disciplines, making it the top comprehensive university in humanities and social sciences nationwide; 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking is about 17th in 2026, consistently in the national top 20 in recent years, with a solid top position in humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially hot but with divergent views; Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics are divergent and wait-and-see; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in this province is about 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% compared to 292,200 in 2025, intensifying competition; Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, not a provincial university; Guangdong is a major source province, and cross-province application willingness is affected by regional preferences, with Beijing universities having a strong appeal to Guangdong candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 148, the easing effect of an 8.6% expansion in 2026, the intensified competition from an 11.6% increase in provincial History Category examinees, and the slight suppression from a somewhat negative reputation, the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is expected to be about 160, with a range of 120–200.
